---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to a project chat with file artifacts
2. Click '📁 Add to project' on a file card
3. ...
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (error message, stuck state, etc.).

**Screenshots / console log**
If possible, open DevTools (F12) → Console and copy any `[atp]` messages.

**Environment**
- Browser: [e.g. Brave 1.70, Chrome 130, Firefox 132]
- Userscript manager: [e.g. Violentmonkey 2.18, Tampermonkey 5.2]
- Script version: [e.g. 2.6.1]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11]

**Additional context**
Any other details (file type, file size, number of files in batch, etc.).
